name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Sign Hillary's card before tomorrow! | Friend --

Tomorrow is our friend Hillary's birthday -- and I have a feeling this is going to be an important year for her (and for all of us)!

The campaign is putting together a card to let Hillary know how many people are thinking of her on her birthday. **[Will you add your name right now?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

A woman as warm, smart, funny, impressive, and passionate as Hillary deserves to know how proud we all are to be on her team. I know it would mean a lot to her to see your name on our birthday card.

**Please sign our birthday card for Hillary before tomorrow:**

| [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you!

Barbara

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MzE4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTg3NTg1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Breaking News: Gaining in Iowa!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

I am taking a quick break from the road in Texas to give you some breaking news on recent critical polling and to update you on our VERY successful trip to Iowa.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31244151:WN_ozOmjN:m:1:879035888:2798544CD91A82C64CECC7AAF1E9A283:r)

You won't hear this story anywhere else. The media wants to write this story differently.

**[So I am coming straight to you](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31244151:WN_ozOmjN:m:1:879035888:2798544CD91A82C64CECC7AAF1E9A283:r)**!

There are less than 100 days until the Iowa Caucuses. Can you believe that?

It is almost time for people to vote and show everyone that pollsters and the media got the story wrong all summer.

Our campaign is starting to feel the momentum on the ground. Recently, I toured several colleges and saw overflow crowds of young people who are invigorated to show up at the Iowa Caucuses.

They want to cut up the Obama credit card that is mortgaging their future and put forward pro-growth policies that will give them the jobs and opportunities they need to succeed.

They have liberal friends who are supporting Bernie Sanders and can't believe that an avowed socialist is near the top of the Democrat contest. They recognize that President Bernie Sanders would make President Barack Obama look like a fiscal conservative.

They know that in the real world, socialism fails and freedom works. The answer to fix Obama's failed policies is not to dive farther left off the cliff into socialism. The answer is to support a candidate who will hold the Constitution in one hand and the Bill of Rights in another.

And the momentum that we are feeling on the ground in Iowa is starting to show up in the polls, in the early states and nationally.

We are gaining ground in Iowa and, in fact, passed Jeb Bush and Carly Fiorina.

We are gaining ground nationally according to CNN and Monmouth polls.

The media wants you to believe that the race is over. They want you to believe that Donald Trump is already the nominee. Nothing could be further from the truth. At this time in 2008 Rudy Giuliani was leading. At this time in 2012 Herman Cain was leading.

Now is our chance for a comeback to capitalize on this momentum and show that liberty is alive and well in America.

I am convinced our campaign has momentum.

I know I have the support of the next generation.

**[Now I am asking you to step up and help us by making a contribution of whatever you can afford to defend liberty across this great country](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31244151:WN_ozOmjN:m:1:879035888:2798544CD91A82C64CECC7AAF1E9A283:r)**.

With your help, we will capitalize on our momentum and ultimately win the nomination.

Sincerely,

Rand Paul

PS: Thank you so much for your support. There are less than 100 days left until Iowa and this is our opportunity to surge.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31244152:WN_ozOmjN:m:1:879035888:2798544CD91A82C64CECC7AAF1E9A283:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31244153:WN_ozOmjN:m:1:879035888:2798544CD91A82C64CECC7AAF1E9A283:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31244154:WN_ozOmjN:m:1:879035888:2798544CD91A82C64CECC7AAF1E9A283:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

name: Candy Carson
subject: Peter, I'd love for Ben to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31246357:WjoDZOmNW:m:1:876315805:C6C7BEBA544497F408DC56D8F2577567:r)
---

Peter,

The next Republican debate is on Wednesday night at 8pm ET, and Ben has been getting ready.
**As he prepares,[I would love for him to hear from you](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31246358:WjoDZOmNW:m:1:876315805:C6C7BEBA544497F408DC56D8F2577567:r). Let me tell you why.**

Ben isn't running for President to build his resume. He doesn't want to be a politician.

He's doing it for our children and grandchildren. Our Constitution was written for them -- to empower them and to ensure they'd have the opportunity to fulfill their God-given potential.

**Before Wednesday night, I'd love to share some words of encouragement with him from his supporters around the country.[Will you take a few minutes to leave him a note?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31246358:WjoDZOmNW:m:1:876315805:C6C7BEBA544497F408DC56D8F2577567:r)

**Just like the others before it, I know that in this debate Ben plans to be himself. He's not looking to attack his fellow candidates or score political points. He will want to share his story, his values, and his solutions for healing and reviving the nation that we both love.

**[I know how much he'll appreciate hearing from you, so I hope you'll leave him a note now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31246358:WjoDZOmNW:m:1:876315805:C6C7BEBA544497F408DC56D8F2577567:r)

**Thank you so much for your prayers and your ongoing support. It means the world to us.

Sincerely,

Candy Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31246359:WjoDZOmNW:m:1:876315805:C6C7BEBA544497F408DC56D8F2577567:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31246360:WjoDZOmNW:m:1:876315805:C6C7BEBA544497F408DC56D8F2577567:r)

body:

We're excited for Wednesday and we appreciate your support!
Michael Celler

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, yesterday, Donald Trump tried to take credit for Ford bringing back jobs from Mexico to the United States.
**
The truth is, this was done in Ohio FOUR YEARS AGO!**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31246122:sVRJ9OmmN:m:1:958431888:29524F4A01DC85AC7A4DF1CCE73F12BE:r)

**Enough is enough. Our country needs real leadership and not empty, false rhetoric**. [Sign our petition](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31246122:sVRJ9OmmN:m:1:958431888:29524F4A01DC85AC7A4DF1CCE73F12BE:r) and consider a [quick contribution to help if you agree!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31246123:sVRJ9OmmN:m:1:958431888:29524F4A01DC85AC7A4DF1CCE73F12BE:r)

Working as a TEAM, Ohioans and Ohio leaders brought Ford production jobs back from Mexico to Ohio years ago. That's how things really get done. Hard work and teamwork brings results for the people.

**Peter, we could use your help in our efforts to get this message out**. Please share this email with five or more contacts and [consider chipping in $25, $50 or more right now to help](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31246123:sVRJ9OmmN:m:1:958431888:29524F4A01DC85AC7A4DF1CCE73F12BE:r).

Our nation needs a leader with a record of actually delivering for all of us, **that's why John Kasich is running for President**.

Thank you for your support.

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31246124:sVRJ9OmmN:m:1:958431888:29524F4A01DC85AC7A4DF1CCE73F12BE:r)

name: Katie McGinty
subject: A fair wage
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
It's pretty simple, Friend.

Nobody working full-time should be living in poverty. And working families should have a shot at getting ahead instead of falling farther behind.

**[That's why I've introduced a plan to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 per hour. Add your name today in support of giving hardworking Americans a raise.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3083476902925565952/-6680787681506492416?ms=e20151026u&refcode=e20151026u&amount=15)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3083476902925565952/-6680787681506492416?ms=e20151026u&refcode=e20151026u&amount=15)
---

**The minimum wage is a guarantee we make to all Americans that if you work hard, you deserve to be fairly compensated.** It helps ensure dignity and respect for everyone who works. Increasing the minimum wage to $15 per hour over a four-year period would be a first step in addressing income inequality and lift millions of Americans out of poverty.

And as a daughter of a restaurant hostess, I believe that any minimum wage increase should also apply to tipped workers -- roughly two-thirds of whom are women who rely on these tips to provide for their families.

**But because of obstruction from Republicans like Pat Toomey, the federal minimum wage has not been raised in six years.** Working Americans have seen their wages stagnate while those at the very top continue to see soaring profits.

Taking action to raise the minimum wage is an important step towards tackling income inequality and ensuring all Americans have a fair shot at achieving the American Dream. It's time that we raise the minimum wage so hardworking families can get ahead.

**[I'm going to fight hard to give all working Americans a fair wage. I hope you'll join with me by adding your name in favor of raising the minimum wage.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3083476902925565952/-6680787681506492416?ms=e20151026u&refcode=e20151026u&amount=15)**

Let's show Pat Toomey that Pennsylvanians are united in ensuring a fair wage for all.

Thanks,

Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3083476902925565952/-6608730087468564480?refcode=e20151026u&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3083476902925565952/-6752845275544420352).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
clean_body: It's pretty simple, Friend. Nobody working full-time should be living in poverty. And working families should have a shot at getting ahead instead of falling farther behind. | The minimum wage is a guarantee we make to all Americans that if you work hard, you deserve to be fairly compensated. It helps ensure dignity and respect for everyone who works. Increasing the minimum wage to $15 per hour over a four-year period would be a first step in addressing income inequality and lift millions of Americans out of poverty. And as a daughter of a restaurant hostess, I believe that any minimum wage increase should also apply to tipped workers -- roughly two-thirds of whom are women who rely on these tips to provide for their families. But because of obstruction from Republicans like Pat Toomey, the federal minimum wage has not been raised in six years. Working Americans have seen their wages stagnate while those at the very top continue to see soaring profits. Taking action to raise the minimum wage is an important step towards tackling income inequality and ensuring all Americans have a fair shot at achieving the American Dream. It's time that we raise the minimum wage so hardworking families can get ahead. Let's show Pat Toomey that Pennsylvanians are united in ensuring a fair wage for all. Thanks, Katie | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: A quick update (it's a good one!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Where we've been and where we're going: | Friend --

I wanted to write to you directly and take a minute to celebrate -- this team has had a truly incredible month!

First, Hillary decisively won the Democratic debate. Politico said it best: "Hillary Clinton Crushes It."

Then, last Thursday, she once again demonstrated her eloquence and complete unflappability in front of the House Select Committee on Benghazi. Hillary spent eleven hours answering questions from a group set up with the explicit purpose of damaging her candidacy. They failed -- and Hillary came out on the other side stronger and more purposeful than ever, ready to move forward and stay focused on the issues that matter to the American people.

Finally, on Saturday, Hillary gave a phenomenal speech at the Iowa Democratic Party's annual J-J Dinner -- historically a pivotal moment on the path to the nomination and a test of a campaign's organizational strength that we passed with flying colors.

Millions of people watched those three events and quite simply felt that they were looking at the next president of the United States.

Just as importantly, while our candidate has been performing her job at the very highest level, so have you. I'm proud to report that hundreds of thousands of people have chipped in to support this campaign -- in fact, more than the Obama campaign had at roughly the same point in 2007. This is crucial not only because we believe strongly in the importance of small donors in the era of super PACs, but also because it represents a broad base of grassroots supporters who will continue to fund this campaign going forward. We've raised more than $75 million for the primary and are well on our way to hitting our 2015 goal.

We're using those resources to build an organization that can win. Our 230 organizers are working out of 33 offices across the early states. Some more fun stats:
* In Iowa, we have a committed caucus-goer in all 1,682 precincts.
* In New Hampshire, organizers are building a town-by-town volunteer grassroots infrastructure.
* Our campaign has been the only one organizing from day one in Nevada, with hundreds of precinct captains already on board.
* In South Carolina, our team has contacted more than 120,000 voters at more than 1,100 events across the state.

And we're gearing up to take on our opponents in the critical primaries in March, too. We have a grassroots movement of volunteers, donors, supporters, and a candidate who can take on anyone and anything.

This campaign has obviously had some tough days -- hell, some tough months -- and we will continue to have our ups and downs. It's important not to get complacent during good times, just as it's important not to panic during challenging ones. But it's also appropriate to celebrate a good stretch like this one, and thank those who made it happen.

Congratulations, team. Onward to Iowa!

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

\----
This campaign is funded by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors -- **[chip in $1 to stand with Hillary right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

| **Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM4MzU4OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjQyNTI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rick Santorum
subject: big week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend --

While some campaigns have received headlines for laying off staff, we just hired five new members of our team!

As some campaigns have folded, we've expanded our Iowa headquarters just to fit all the volunteers who are coming to help out.

And just last week, I unveiled my Economic Freedom Agenda in a _Wall Street Journal_ op-ed where I called for the corrupt tax code to be scrapped, illegal immigration to be stopped, and all of Obama's job-killing regulations to be thrown in the dumpster. Right now, I'm hard at work preparing for Wednesday's Republican debate.

We're on a roll! But we can't keep the momentum going without your help.

[Can you help out with a donation of $25, $50, or $100 so we can keep up this pace and our message of protecting American workers can reach as many people as possible?](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=s_debate_ask&n=1&v=18)

During Wednesday's debate, I am going to draw a line in the sand for the American worker. CNBC is the network of Wall Street, but I'm committed to fighting for Main Street. My Economic Freedom Agenda is a bold plan that I deeply believes will get our country back on track for all Americans.

Help me ensure we can show widespread support for the most comprehensive plan to create more opportunity for everyone to rise in society and make life better and safer for all American workers and their families.

-Rick

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=s_debate_ask&n=2&v=18) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=s_debate_ask&n=3&v=18) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=s_debate_ask&n=4&v=18), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=s_debate_ask&n=5&v=18), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=s_debate_ask&n=6&v=18).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=s_debate_ask&n=7&v=18)

name: Jessica S., Bernie 2016 Supporter
subject: My daughter asked about her college savings account
disclaimer_text: paid for by generous Bernie supporters who gave to the campaign (Thank you!)
body:
#
Friend -
It was my ten-year-old daughter who inspired me to get involved in politics and declare my support for Bernie Sanders' campaign. One day she came home from school and started talking to me about college and asked how much money I had in her college savings account.
The look on her face when I told her she didn't have a college account broke my heart.
As a teacher in Iowa carrying six-figures of student debt, it would completely change my life and my daughter's life if Bernie were to become president. It would mean that if she worked hard in school, she would be guaranteed the opportunity to fulfill her dreams and make a difference in the world the best way she can.
I promised my daughter on that day that I would do everything I could to elect a president who will fight to make college affordable and eliminate student debt. As a result, I've been a committed volunteer for Bernie's campaign since the office first opened in Des Moines.
Two nights ago, I attended the Iowa Jefferson-Jackson dinner with one of the tickets paid for by generous Bernie supporters who gave to the campaign (Thank you!). The rally before the event was one of the best events I have been to so far. It was packed! There was so much excitement and enthusiasm. That energy carried over into the main event where Bernie talked about his history of fighting for progressive values and his vision for the future of our country when he's elected President of the United States.
[**You definitely need to watch the short video wrap-up from the big day and share it with your friends right now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d16/2666718789/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/jj-dinner?source=em151026jj")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d17/2666718789/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/video.php?v=920928704628801&set=vb.124955570892789&type=2&theater") [](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d14/2666718789/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/BernieSanders/statuses/658701226867978240")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d16/2666718789/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/jj-dinner?source=em151026jj")
One thing I have learned through my experience with the campaign is that Bernie Sanders' supporters are a very special group of people. They are so friendly and welcoming. We are a community of people joined together by our support for Bernie and his work on behalf of the issues that impact our lives. You put us in a room to work together and it's like we've known each other our entire lives.
This weekend was greater than I ever expected it to be. I felt privileged to be able to experience it firsthand. [**I hope you 'll watch and share the behind-the-scenes look at our campaign's big weekend in Iowa.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d16/2666718789/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/jj-dinner?source=em151026jj")
Only ninety-eight days until the Iowa Caucus. The revolution starts here.
All my best,
Jessica S.
Iowa Supporter & Volunteer
Bernie 2016
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d15/2666718789/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151026jj-jessica")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d12/2666718789/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d13/2666718789/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d10/2666718789/VEsP/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2474/43f17890/5201b512/621f4d11/2666718789/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Samantha Gross, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: six months out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f94/70cdc2ba/47b51b4b/3961025/884612944/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom1015?refcode=em10262015&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+contribute+today+and+have+&utm_campaign=em10262015&source=em10262015") Friend - Today marks six months away from Primary Day, and we're fired up by the huge support Chris has across our state. With only six months to go, we know how much more work there is to do. We're charging full steam ahead to make sure we send an effective fighter to the Senate.

**Now here 's some really big news: a group of dedicated supporters have stepped up and offered a special Six Months Out Match of $10,000**. Between now and October 31st, every dollar you contribute will be matched, up to $10,000, doubling your impact!

This is a huge opportunity to show the power of our grassroots support. **Will you step up and contribute today and have your gift matched?**

**[Click here to contribute today and have your gift matched dollar for dollar. Double your impact right now!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f94/70cdc2ba/47b51b4b/3961021/884612944/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom1015?refcode=em10262015&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+contribute+today+and+have+&utm_campaign=em10262015&source=em10262015")**

There's no doubt that we need Chris in the Senate. He's the only one in this race with a proven record of getting real results for Maryland, and for leading the fight against Tea Party extremism in Congress. But we can't do it without you.

Don't lose out on this opportunity to make twice the difference in electing Chris. **[Give now and double your impact to help Chris win. Contribute today!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f94/70cdc2ba/47b51b4b/396103e/884612944/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom1015?refcode=em10262015&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Give+now+and+double+your+impact+to+help+&utm_campaign=em10262015&source=em10262015")**

Thanks for all your support,

Samantha Gross

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate

name: Official Clinton Campaign
subject: 🎂 It’s Hillary’s big day! 🎂
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Last chance to sign her card! | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4Mzk2ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNjkwNzEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
